attributes.action: Secure Jobs for newly qualified Midwives in Wales.
attributes.additional_details:
We would like you to provide immediate, ring-fenced funding to NHS Wales health boards to recruit newly qualified midwives from the 2026 cohort.
 Transparency from Health Education and Improvement Wales
“Require clear, transparent communication from HEIW and health boards about job availability and workforce planning. Align training with workforce planning.
Ensure that commissioned training places are properly aligned with actual workforce capacity to prevent this situation happening again.”
attributes.background: We want the Welsh Government to ensure that newly qualified midwives in 2026 are able to transition into NHS Wales roles as originally intended.

rejection.details:
Your petition is about something that the Welsh Government and Welsh Parliament is responsible for. That means that the UK Government and Parliament can't look into it.

The Welsh Parliament has its own Petitions Committee. If you'd like to send your petition to the Welsh Parliament, you can find out more here: https://petitions.senedd.wales/

You may also wish to raise this issue with your local Members of the Senedd who represent you. You can find out who your Members of the Senedd are and how to contact them here: https://senedd.wales/find-a-member-of-the-senedd/
